name: bluetooth_input
description: Bluetooth A2DP audio receiver for Volumio
author: Volumio Community

volumio_info.details: Turns your Volumio device into a Bluetooth audio receiver. Stream music from any Bluetooth-enabled phone, tablet, or computer via A2DP.
volumio_info.changelog: 1.0.0: Initial release with scan, pair, auto-connect, and output device tracking.
